title: Real gundams, top 3D generator, open-source world models, ChatGPT updates, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search publishes a comprehensive video news roundup covering 20+ new AI tools and research projects released in the reporting period. Featured items include 3D generation (Pixal3D, Articraft), world models (Sana-WM), video synthesis (Krea2, AsymFlow), and updates to ChatGPT with finance features and phone Codex access. Sponsored content includes Higgsfield MCP.
